overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a luxury high-rise bedroom interior overlooking a rainy, neon-lit futuristic cityscape at night. The scene features modern furniture and large windows revealing a dense cyberpunk metropolis with towering skyscrapers and a solitary palm tree visible through the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary, observing the rainy cyberpunk cityscape through the bedroom windows

tall glass windows spanning the wall behind the bed, revealing the exterior city view
dense cyberpunk metropolis with towering skyscrapers, neon lights, and atmospheric fog visible through the glass
solitary palm tree silhouette visible outside against the city backdrop
round metallic lamp or decorative object on a stand near the window
transparent glass partition wall separating the bedroom from an adjacent area
warm rectangular wall sconce illuminating the left side of the room

segments.scene_description: A static view of a modern luxury bedroom in a high-rise apartment overlooking a rainy futuristic city at night. The large bed with white sheets sits in the foreground while floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a dense cyberpunk metropolis with glowing neon lights, towering buildings, and a single palm tree visible through the glass. The room features contemporary furniture including a spherical lamp and warm wall lighting contrasting with the cool blue tones of the city outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a luxury high-rise bedroom that contrasts intimate interior warmth with a sprawling, rainy cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with a focus on the modern bedroom, where a large bed with white sheets and a spherical lamp create a cozy foreground. As the eye moves toward the floor-to-ceiling windows, the warm wall lighting shifts into the cool blue and neon tones of the city outside. The scene then expands to reveal a dense cityscape of towering skyscrapers and glowing lights, with a solitary palm tree visible through the rain-streaked glass.
